creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-03-06 18:42:29 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-toolkits         Makefile 
  Added files:
    x11-toolkits/phat    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  PHAT is a collection of GTK+ widgets geared toward pro-audio apps.
  The goal is to eliminate duplication of effort and provide some
  standardization (well, at least for GTK+ apps).
  
  WWW:    http://phat.berlios.de/
  
  PR:             ports/109985
  Submitted by:   trasz <trasz at pin.if.uz.zgora.pl>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.446     +1 -0      ports/x11-toolkits/Makefile
  1.1       +26 -0     ports/x11-toolkits/phat/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/x11-toolkits/phat/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/x11-toolkits/phat/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +54 -0     ports/x11-toolkits/phat/pkg-plist (new)
